title: Issue-cycle NWP trajectory-shape residual expert for group 3
rationale: The public-best fine meta-gate surface can still contain residual error tied to the shape of the 24-hour forecast trajectory within one NWP issue cycle. Cycle mean, spread, extrema, and lead-relative deviations are available at issue time and do not use SCADA or future-valid weather.
expected_signal: A positive-residual-only bounded expert must improve Q1-to-Q2 and locked H1-to-H2 score, 1-NMAE, and FICR, remain positive in every monthly fold, and clear issue-cycle bootstrap positive-fraction and q05 gates against the rolling fine incumbent.
risk_notes: No labels are used in trajectory features. The fine incumbent is reconstructed with threshold=.545 and extra_alpha=.50 using Q1->Q2 and H1->H2 rolling probabilities. Candidate generation is disabled until all locked monthly and issue-cycle gates pass.
